claim: For a 4096x4097 group_size=128 packed uint4 GEMV on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, one-CTA-per-row fused unpack/dequant/reduction measured 6.360370x faster than the one-thread-per-row seed baseline using HIP-event timing only, while exercising odd-column packing and group-tail metadata.
expected_profiler_signals: more parallel K reduction per output row
correct tail guards for odd packed column and final group
curation_note: timing-only seed-baseline tail sweep: HIP-event timings and correctness passed for odd K and group-tail metadata, but rocprofiler/rocprof counters were not collected and no matching quantized library or inference-engine baseline is attached.
